name: Bold Commerce API
what_it_does: Bold Commerce REST API — headless checkout and subscription management platform for e-commerce brands, enabling agents to automate subscription lifecycle management, custom checkout flows, and recurring billing outside of Shopify's native checkout.
use_cases: Agents managing subscription lifecycle — creating, pausing, resuming, and canceling customer subscriptions via Bold Subscriptions API
Headless checkout — agents integrating Bold Checkout for custom checkout experiences on Shopify or other platforms
Subscription analytics — agents querying Bold for MRR, churn, and subscriber metrics to power business intelligence
Order management — agents syncing Bold subscription orders with fulfillment systems and ERPs
Promotional pricing — agents creating and managing discount campaigns and subscription offers via Bold API
not_for: Small merchants — Bold Commerce is priced for mid-market and enterprise brands; use Shopify's native subscriptions for small stores
Non-Shopify platforms — Bold's primary integration is Shopify; other platforms have limited support
Simple one-time purchase checkout — Bold's strength is subscriptions; use Shopify native or Stripe for simple one-time transactions
best_when: You're a Shopify merchant running a subscription business that needs more control over checkout and subscription management than Shopify's native tools provide.
avoid_when: You're not a Shopify merchant or don't have a subscription business model — Bold's value is specifically in Shopify subscription management.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for merchant-facing integrations (Shopify app-style flow). API keys for direct access. Scoped access for subscription management, order management, and customer data. Credentials tied to Bold merchant account.

pricing.paid_tiers: Bold Subscriptions: from $39.99/month + revenue share; Bold Checkout: enterprise pricing via sales
pricing.notes: Subscription pricing with revenue share component. Enterprise Checkout has custom pricing. Bold targets mid-market and enterprise Shopify brands. ROI justified for high-volume subscription merchants.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by endpoint; subscription management: ~100 req/min; higher for enterprise plans

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with reasonable documentation. Error responses include error codes and messages. Webhook events available for subscription lifecycle. API documentation less polished than modern-first API companies.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscription updates are idempotent by subscription ID. Order creation not idempotent. Webhook delivery may retry — agents should handle duplicate events.
known_agent_gotchas: Bold API is tightly coupled to Shopify's customer and product data — agents need Shopify customer IDs for most operations
Subscription state machine has specific allowed transitions — canceling an already-canceled subscription returns error
Webhook events fire for subscription lifecycle but not all order events — supplement with Shopify webhooks for complete order tracking
API versioning less mature than Shopify's — breaking changes can occur without deprecation warnings
Rate limits not prominently documented — implement conservative backoff for bulk subscription operations

security_score_components.security_notes: PCI-DSS compliant for payment handling. SOC2 certified. TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scopes provides reasonable access control. Canadian company with US/CA data processing.
